message:
test: isolate append-path probe DBs, extract retry backoff, fix u64 overflow semantics

Three independent test/benchmark improvements:

1. bd_qayid_track_t_append_path: The throughput probe previously inserted
   both sequential and gapped rowid sets into different tables of the SAME
   database, meaning the second insert's pager state was contaminated by
   the first insert's page allocations. This commit gives each workload its
   own database (seq_db_path / gap_db_path) with an identically-named table
   "t" so metrics reflect isolated pager behavior. Also renames conn →
   seq_conn / gap_conn for clarity.

2. concurrent_write_persistent_bench: Extracts the magic
   Duration::from_micros(100) retry sleep into a RETRY_BACKOFF constant at
   module scope. Several call sites previously computed variable backoff
   (100µs × retry_count) which was inconsistent with other sites using
   fixed 100µs — unified to the fixed constant for deterministic benchmark
   timing.

3. compat_tests: u64::MAX conversion to ParamValue now produces
   SqliteValue::Text (exact decimal representation) instead of clamping to
   i64::MAX. This matches the principle that lossless storage is preferable
   to silent truncation for values outside the signed 64-bit range. Updated
   test names and assertions accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
